class.name: SimulationManager
class.brief_description: Manages the 16-byte bitwise grid simulation, including scent propagation and the Branchless ALU.
class.description: The SimulationManager is the primary GDExtension bridge between Godot and the C++ simulation engine. It handles the lifetime of the grid memory, the execution of the "Smellnet" AI pathfinding, and the Branchless ALU for complex elemental interactions.

method.name: add_annihilation
method.description: Registers a mutual annihilation rule between two effect bits. If both bits are present on a tile during a simulation step, they will both be destroyed.

method.name: add_biome_transition
method.description: Defines how a specific biome reacts to a surviving effect bit. For example, Fire (effect) on Grass (biome) could result in Ash (new biome).

method.name: add_chemistry
method.description: Registers a chemical combination rule. If Bit A and Bit B are present, they are consumed to create the resulting effect stack (which can contain one or more bits).

method.name: clear_interaction_tables
method.description: Wipes all annihilation, chemistry, and biome transition rules from the LUTs. Useful for re-loading definitions from JSON.

method.name: generate_new_world
method.description: Clears the grid and generates a new world state based on the provided seed.

method.name: get_grid_data
method.description: Returns the raw 1D array of 16-byte tiles as a PackedByteArray, suitable for passing to Vulkan Storage Buffers in Godot shaders.

method.name: get_scent
method.description: Returns the 4-bit scent value (0-15) for the specified coordinate.

method.name: get_tile_composition
method.description: Returns the 8-bit composition (biome ID) of the specified tile.

method.name: get_tile_effects
method.description: Returns the current 64-bit effect stack for the specified tile.

method.name: is_impassable
method.description: Returns true if the tile is flagged as impassable for scent propagation and unit movement.

method.name: run_scent_update
method.description: Executes the BFS scent propagation algorithm from the player's current position.

method.name: run_step
method.description: Executes one discrete simulation step, processing the Branchless ALU for all active tiles. Transient effects are cleared at the end of the step.

method.name: set_impassable
method.description: Sets or clears the impassable flag for the specified tile.

method.name: set_tile_composition
method.description: Manually sets the composition (biome ID) for a specific tile.

method.name: set_tile_effect
method.description: Injects an effect bit into the specified tile's effect stack.

members.member: The vertical height of the grid in tiles.
The horizontal width of the grid in tiles.
